goal: is_continuous[X, Y](f) = forall(x0: Set[Y]) { Y.is_open(x0) implies X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0)) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not T0.is_open(x1) or T1.is_open(set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x1)) } = is_continuous[T1, T0](x0) }[Y, X](f)

goal: is_continuous[X, Y](f) = forall(x0: Set[Y]) { Y.is_open(x0) implies X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0)) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not T0.is_open(x1) or T1.is_open(set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x1)) } = is_continuous[T1, T0](x0) }[Y, X](f)

goal: is_continuous[Y, Z](g) = forall(x0: Set[Z]) { Z.is_open(x0) implies Y.is_open(set_preimage[Y, Z](g, x0)) }
proof: function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not T0.is_open(x1) or T1.is_open(set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x1)) } = is_continuous[T1, T0](x0) }[Z, Y](g)
is_continuous[Y, Z](g)
(forall(x0: Set[Z]) { not Z.is_open(x0) or Y.is_open(set_preimage[Y, Z](g, x0)) } = true)
function(x0: Set[Z]) { not (Z.is_open(x0) and not Y.is_open(set_preimage[Y, Z](g, x0))) }(w)
is_continuous[X, Y](f)
(forall(x0: Set[Y]) { not Y.is_open(x0) or X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0)) } = true)
function(x0: Set[Y]) { not (Y.is_open(x0) and not X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, x0))) }(set_preimage[Y, Z](g, w))

goal: compose[X, Y, Z](g, f, x) = g(f(x))
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[X, Y, Z](g, f, x)

goal: preimage_contains[X, Z](compose[X, Y, Z](g, f), w, x) = w.contains(g(f(x)))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { preimage_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[X, Z](compose[X, Y, Z](g, f), w, x)

goal: set_preimage[X, Z](compose[X, Y, Z](g, f), w).contains(x) = w.contains(g(f(x)))
preimage_contains[X, Y](f, set_preimage[Y, Z](g, w), x) = set_preimage[Y, Z](g, w).contains(f(x))
proof: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { preimage_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[X, Y](f, set_preimage[Y, Z](g, w), x)

goal: set_preimage[X, Y](f, set_preimage[Y, Z](g, w)).contains(x) = set_preimage[Y, Z](g, w).contains(f(x))

proof: function[T0, T1, T3](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T3, x2: Set[T3]) { set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, set_preimage[T1, T3](x1, x2)) = set_preimage[T0, T3](compose[T0, T1, T3](x1, x0), x2) }[X, Y, Z](f, g, w)

goal: set_preimage[X, Z](compose[X, Y, Z](g, f), w).contains(x) = set_preimage[X, Y](f, set_preimage[Y, Z](g, w)).contains(x)
X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Z](compose[X, Y, Z](g, f), w))
proof: function[T0, T1, T3](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T3, x2: Set[T3]) { set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, set_preimage[T1, T3](x1, x2)) = set_preimage[T0, T3](compose[T0, T1, T3](x1, x0), x2) }[X, Y, Z](f, g, w)

function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not T0.is_open(x1) or T1.is_open(set_preimage[T1, T0](x0, x1)) } = is_continuous[T1, T0](x0) }[Z, X](compose[X, Y, Z](g, f))

goal: forall(x0: Set[TopoExample] -> Bool) { forall(x1: Set[TopoExample]) { x0(x1) implies topo_example_open(x1) } implies topo_example_open(big_union[TopoExample](x0)) }
proof: let w0: Set[TopoExample] -> Bool satisfy { forall(x0: Set[TopoExample]) { not w0(x0) or topo_example_open(x0) } and not topo_example_open(big_union[TopoExample](w0)) }
function(x0: Set[TopoExample]) { topo_example_open(x0) }(big_union[TopoExample](w0))
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Set[TopoExample]](Set.empty_set[TopoExample])
function(x0: Set[TopoExample]) { topo_example_open(x0) }(identity_fn(Set.empty_set[TopoExample]))

goal: forall(x0: Set[TopoExample], x1: Set[TopoExample]) { topo_example_open(x0) and topo_example_open(x1) implies topo_example_open(x0.intersection(x1)) }
proof: let w0: Set[TopoExample] satisfy { exists(k0: Set[TopoExample]) { topo_example_open(w0) and topo_example_open(k0) and not topo_example_open(w0 ∩ k0) } }
let w1: Set[TopoExample] satisfy { topo_example_open(w0) and topo_example_open(w1) and not topo_example_open(w0 ∩ w1) }
let w2: Set[TopoExample] satisfy { topo_example_open(w0) and topo_example_open(w2) and not topo_example_open(w0 ∩ w2) }
function(x0: Set[TopoExample]) { topo_example_open(x0) }(w0 ∩ w2)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Set[TopoExample]](Set.universal_set[TopoExample])
function(x0: Set[TopoExample]) { topo_example_open(x0) }(identity_fn(Set.universal_set[TopoExample]))
